summary: Completed full backend + frontend testing for João Victor Tavares portfolio. All 7 pytest backend tests pass (root health, contact POST valid/invalid email/empty name/empty message/missing fields, GET sorted desc). Frontend loads cleanly, Hero 3D canvas mounts, all 5 nav links + LinkedIn href correct, framework cluster matrix interactive (clicking cluster-row-B updates active-cluster-card), metrics-grid renders 6 cells, contact form shows error toast on empty submit and success toast on valid submit (verified persistence via GET /api/contact), and mobile nav toggle opens menu with all 5 mobile-nav-* items working.
critical_code_review_comments: Individual metric cells inside [data-testid=metrics-grid] do not have per-cell data-testid (e.g. metric-cell-0..5). Test request expected 'metric-cell-*' selectors; verified by counting children (=6) instead. Consider adding data-testid={`metric-cell-${i}`} to each motion.div for cleaner test targeting.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI '@app.on_event("shutdown")' — should migrate to lifespan context manager (FastAPI 0.110+).
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True which browsers reject; fine for current public preview but should be locked down to specific origins for production.
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_-prefixed contact submissions via API and UI (TEST_User, TEST_A, TEST_B, TEST_UI_*). Safe to clear from db.contact_submissions if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and target the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. All 14 review items verified passing. Only nit: individual metric cells lack data-testid attributes; child count check used as workaround. UI submissions were verified by querying /api/contact and matching names with prefix TEST_UI_.
rca of the issue: No bugs found — all 14 features in the review request pass.
